title: Legal Advisory Services in Vietnam
metaDescription: Employ your own corporate secretary with legal advisory services, including compliance updates, fulfilling reports & other administrative processes.

hero.title: Legal Advisory Services in Vietnam
hero.subtitle: As your trusted corporate legal advisor, we are dedicated to ensuring your business ventures into Vietnam are seamless and successful. Whether you're starting a new business or expanding operations, our business consulting lawyers guarantee a hassle-free market entry experience.

sections.heading: Benefits of Hiring Top Legal Consulting Firms like WTP Advisory

items.title: Register your Products for Sale in Vietnam
items.desc: Ensure you have all required documents for import and sale, guided by experienced legal advisors for startups.

items.title: Your Own On-demand Legal Advisor
items.desc: Gain the advantage of having your own advisor who guarantees compliance for your business.

items.title: Full Transparency throughout the Process
items.desc: Navigate regulatory complexities smoothly with reliable, client-centric, and transparent business law advisors.

items.title: Both Remote and In-person Communication
items.desc: Enjoy tailored digital solutions for remote and in-person consultations with our corporate legal advisors.

sections.heading: What is a Corporate Secretary?
body: Also known as a compliance officer, this is a senior position in a public or private firm that oversees the administrative activities of the board of directors and senior management.

sections.heading: WTP Advisory’s Corporate Secretarial Service
sections.subtitle: Responsibilities of Corporate Secretary
items: Local compliance, adding shareholders and investors in fundraising rounds
Timely statutory and regulatory updates for all clients
Maintain compliance with Vietnam’s record-keeping regulations, updating records as required
Craft and update company constitution as required for compliance
Offer outsourcing services for annual compliance, including executive prep and meeting documentation

items.title: Leasing Contract Review
items.desc: WTP Advisory begins with the crucial step of finalizing and confirming the deal structure and term sheet with the client, then reviews and revises the contract base term sheet against client requirements.

items.title: Corporate Bank Account
items.desc: WTP Advisory offers comprehensive financial consultancy services, advising on documentation, collecting necessary materials, and efficiently facilitating offshore corporate bank account openings.

items.title: Nominee Director & Company
items.desc: WTP Advisory supports foreign entrepreneurs looking to establish and operate businesses in Vietnam. Our business consulting services cover ownership facilitation, asset management, swift market entry, and potential licensing and capital advantages.

items.title: Product Registration
items.desc: Rely on WTP Advisory for product regulation compliance, offering licensing, product registration (medical devices, food & beverage, food supplement…), and tax services to streamline the importation of your products into Vietnam.

items.title: Trademark Registration
items.desc: With the constantly changing regulations, our experienced bilingual legal team will help you register your trademark easily and quickly from day one, so you can do business without any worries.

items.title: Business License & Sub-Licenses
items.desc: Explore our Sublicense Service for efficient license acquisition and expert support in Vietnam, ensuring regulatory compliance and a seamless application experience with our legal advisors.

items.title: FDI – ISA Reports
items.desc: WTP Advisory specializes in legal advisory services for FDI and ISA Reports, offering status checks, account issuance, and successful submission, which ensure compliance for your business.

items.title: Submit Your Information & Needs
items.desc: Tell us about your company’s needs and aspirations for our financial consultancy services in Vietnam

items.title: Book a Consultation With Our Experts
items.desc: Go over your plan with one of our bilingual business strategy consultants who are also experienced corporate legal advisors.

items.title: Verify KYC Documents
items.desc: Our team will guide you through processing the necessary paperwork to create your company dossier.

items.title: Choose a Plan & Succeed In Vietnam
items.desc: Let our business consulting lawyers simplify your business journey and make your mark in APAC’s fastest-growing economy
